relationship: 親に進路を反対された友達同士
setting: 親に進路を反対されたあと、友達に相談する
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I'm free to be whatever I
Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
I'm free to say whatever I
Whatever I like if it's wrong or right, it's alright
[Chorus]
Always seems to me
You only see what people want you to see
How long's it gonna be
Before we get on the bus and 'cause no fuss?
Get a grip on yourself
It don't cost much
[Verse 2]
Free to be whatever you
Whatever you say if it comes my way, it's alright
You're free to be wherever you
Wherever you please you can shoot the breeze if you want
[Chorus]
It always seems to me
You only see what people want you to see
How long's it gonna be
Before we get on the bus and 'cause no fuss?
Get a grip on yourself
It don't cost much
[Verse 3]
I'm free to be whatever I
Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
[Bridge]
Here in my mind
You know you might find
Something that you
You thought you once knew
But now it's all gone
And you know it's no fun
Yeah, I know it's no fun
Oh, I know it's no fun
[Verse 4]
I'm free to be whatever I
Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
I'm free to be whatever I
Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
[Outro]
Whatever you do
Whatever you say
Yeah, I know it's alright
Whatever you do
Whatever you say
Yeah, I know it's alright

lyricsJa.en: I'm free to be whatever I
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は何にだってなれる

lyricsJa.en: Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
lyricsJa.ja: 自分で選べるし、歌いたければブルースだって歌う

lyricsJa.en: I'm free to say whatever I
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は何だって言える

lyricsJa.en: Whatever I like if it's wrong or right, it's alright
lyricsJa.ja: 好きなことを言える、間違っていようが正しかろうが大丈夫
いつも僕にはそう見える

lyricsJa.en: You only see what people want you to see
lyricsJa.ja: 君は人が見せたいものだけを見ている
あとどれくらいかかるんだろう

lyricsJa.en: Before we get on the bus and 'cause no fuss?
lyricsJa.ja: 騒ぎ立てずにバスに乗れるようになるまで
しっかりしろよ
それに大したことじゃない
君だって何にでもなれる

lyricsJa.en: Whatever you say if it comes my way, it's alright
lyricsJa.ja: 君が何を言っても、それが僕のほうへ来るなら大丈夫

lyricsJa.en: You're free to be wherever you
lyricsJa.ja: 君はどこにいたって自由だ

lyricsJa.en: Wherever you please you can shoot the breeze if you want
lyricsJa.ja: 好きな場所で、望むなら気楽におしゃべりすればいい
いつも僕にはそう見える

lyricsJa.en: You only see what people want you to see
lyricsJa.ja: 君は人が見せたいものだけを見ている
あとどれくらいかかるんだろう

lyricsJa.en: Before we get on the bus and 'cause no fuss?
lyricsJa.ja: 騒ぎ立てずにバスに乗れるようになるまで
しっかりしろよ
それに大したことじゃない

lyricsJa.en: I'm free to be whatever I
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は何にだってなれる

lyricsJa.en: Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
lyricsJa.ja: 自分で選べるし、歌いたければブルースだって歌う
僕の心の中では
君は見つけるかもしれない
君がかつて
知っていると思っていた何かを
でも今はもう全部消えてしまった

lyricsJa.en: And you know it's no fun
lyricsJa.ja: それが楽しくないことは君にもわかるだろう

lyricsJa.en: Yeah, I know it's no fun
lyricsJa.ja: そう、僕にも楽しくないってわかる

lyricsJa.en: Oh, I know it's no fun
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、楽しくなんかない

lyricsJa.en: I'm free to be whatever I
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は何にだってなれる

lyricsJa.en: Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
lyricsJa.ja: 自分で選べるし、歌いたければブルースだって歌う

lyricsJa.en: I'm free to be whatever I
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は何にだってなれる

lyricsJa.en: Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
lyricsJa.ja: 自分で選べるし、歌いたければブルースだって歌う
君が何をしても
君が何を言っても
ああ、大丈夫だって僕にはわかってる
君が何をしても
君が何を言っても
ああ、大丈夫だって僕にはわかってる

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: My dad thinks I'm being unrealistic.
sentences.displayHtml: My dad thinks I'm being unrealistic.

sentences.text: He wants me to choose something safer.
sentences.displayHtml: He wants me to choose something safer.

conversation.japanese: 父さんは僕が現実を見てないって思ってる。もっと安全な道を選べって。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: What do you want, though?
sentences.displayHtml: What do you want, though?

sentences.text: Not what they want.
sentences.displayHtml: Not what they want.

sentences.text: You.
sentences.displayHtml: You.

conversation.japanese: でも君はどうしたいの？周りが望むことじゃなくて、君自身は。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: That's the problem.
sentences.displayHtml: That's the problem.

sentences.text: I keep hearing everyone else until I can't hear myself.
sentences.displayHtml: I keep hearing everyone else until I can't hear myself.

conversation.japanese: そこなんだ。周りの声ばかり聞いてるうちに、自分の声が聞こえなくなってる。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Maybe you're seeing what people want you to see, not what's actually possible.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe you're seeing what people want you to see, not what's actually possible.

conversation.japanese: たぶん君は、人が見せたいものだけを見てるんだよ。本当に可能なことじゃなくて。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It seems to me like choosing what I love means disappointing everyone.
sentences.displayHtml: It seems to me like choosing what I love means disappointing everyone.

conversation.japanese: 好きなものを選ぶって、みんなをがっかりさせることみたいに思える。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: It doesn't have to.
sentences.displayHtml: It doesn't have to.

sentences.text: You can care about them and still choose your own life.
sentences.displayHtml: You can care about them and still choose your own life.

conversation.japanese: そうとは限らないよ。周りを大事にしながら、自分の人生を選んでもいい。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I wish I could say whatever I like without feeling guilty.
sentences.displayHtml: I wish I could say whatever I like without feeling guilty.

conversation.japanese: 罪悪感を持たずに、好きなことを言えたらいいのに。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Then start small.
sentences.displayHtml: Then start small.

sentences.text: Say one honest thing tonight.
sentences.displayHtml: Say one honest thing tonight.

sentences.text: It don't cost much to tell the truth gently.
sentences.displayHtml: It don't cost much to tell the truth gently.

conversation.japanese: じゃあ小さく始めよう。今夜、正直なことをひとつ言ってみて。やさしく本音を伝えるのに、大きな代償はいらないよ。

sentences.text: Like what?
sentences.displayHtml: Like what?

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: For example, say this: I don't know everything yet, but I want to try.
sentences.displayHtml: For example, say this: I don't know everything yet, but I want to try.

sentences.text: That's enough.
sentences.displayHtml: That's enough.

conversation.japanese: 「まだ全部はわからないけど、やってみたい」って。それで十分だよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I guess I've been waiting for permission.
sentences.displayHtml: I guess I've been waiting for permission.

conversation.japanese: たぶん、誰かに「選んでいい」って言ってもらうのを待ってたんだと思う。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Your family might not say that for you.
sentences.displayHtml: Your family might not say that for you.

sentences.text: So maybe this is where you get a grip on yourself and choose carefully anyway.
sentences.displayHtml: So maybe this is where you get a grip on yourself and choose carefully anyway.

conversation.japanese: 家族は「選んでいいよ」とは言ってくれないかもしれない。だからこそ、ここで自分をしっかり持って、慎重に選ぶしかないのかも。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Here in my mind, I already know what I want.
sentences.displayHtml: Here in my mind, I already know what I want.

sentences.text: I'm just scared to say it out loud.
sentences.displayHtml: I'm just scared to say it out loud.

conversation.japanese: 心の中では、もう自分が何を望んでるかはわかってる。ただ、それを声に出すのが怖いんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: That's okay.
sentences.displayHtml: That's okay.

sentences.text: If you say it once, you might hear yourself more clearly.
sentences.displayHtml: If you say it once, you might hear yourself more clearly.

conversation.japanese: それでいいよ。一度口に出せば、自分の気持ちがもっとはっきり聞こえるかもしれない。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Maybe you might find the courage you once knew when you stop trying to please everyone.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe you might find the courage you once knew when you stop trying to please everyone.

conversation.japanese: みんなを喜ばせようとするのをやめたら、昔持っていた勇気を見つけられるのかもしれない。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Exactly.
sentences.displayHtml: Exactly.

sentences.text: And there's no fun in living a life that looks right to everyone else but feels wrong to you.
sentences.displayHtml: And there's no fun in living a life that looks right to everyone else but feels wrong to you.

conversation.japanese: その通り。周りから正しく見えても、自分には違うと感じる人生を生きるのは楽しくないよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Then whatever I choose, I want it to be mine.
sentences.displayHtml: Then whatever I choose, I want it to be mine.

conversation.japanese: じゃあ、何を選ぶにしても、自分で選んだものにしたい。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Good.
sentences.displayHtml: Good.

sentences.text: Whatever you say to them, make sure it sounds like you.
sentences.displayHtml: Whatever you say to them, make sure it sounds like you.

conversation.japanese: いいね。家族に伝えるときは、ちゃんと君らしい言葉でね。
